text: Trump returns to Mount Rushmore after years of hinting he belongs there - The Washington Post
fullText: The White House says there would be “no better addition” to Mount Rushmore than Trump, who last month posted an image of his face on the monument.

text: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married in ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler - CBS News
fullText: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were married as they celebrated their wedding with hundreds of guests Friday at Madison Square Garden in New York City.

text: St. Petersburg oil terminal reportedly struck by Ukrainian drones - The Kyiv Independent
fullText: Ukraine's military reportedly carried out an attack on St. Petersburg in the early hours of July 4, striking an oil terminal in the city, Russian Telegram media channels reported.

text: Iran begins dayslong funeral for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed in war - AP News
fullText: Iran has begun a dayslong funeral for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, months after an airstrike killed him at the start of the war. He was 86. Khamenei's body will be on display at the Grand Mosalla in Tehran, Iran’s capital, beginning Saturda…

text: Donald Trump Tries to Troll Taylor Swift on Her Wedding Night, But She Parties on - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: The specter of a wedding on a holiday he seeks to own seemed to irk the president, or at least the staff manning the White House Instagram feed.

text: Family-owned company prepares to put on the largest fireworks display in history: "It is the biggest show that we've ever done" - CBS News
fullText: When the sun goes down on Independence Day, the skies of Washington, D.C., are expected to fill with a record-setting 850,000 individual fireworks for a 40-minute spectacle like no one has seen before.

text: Egypt coach dedicates World Cup win to Palestine as Arab world celebrates - Al Jazeera
fullText: Fans in Gaza celebrated Egypt’s win at match screenings held against the backdrop of bombed buildings.

text: Brad Paisley, Kimberly Williams-Paisley Thank Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for 'Amazing Donation' - Rolling Stone
fullText: Brad Paisley and Kimberly Williams-Paisley thanked Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for their "amazing donation" ahead of the couple's wedding.

text: Trump administration’s interpretation of slavery under George Washington can be reinstalled - Politico
fullText: The new historical panels were designed to replace ones put up in 2010 that told the story of how nine slaves lived in the President's House in Philadelphia in the 1790s.

text: Thousands forced to evacuate in Colorado as wildfire spreads - Al Jazeera
fullText: The Aspen Acres Fire, one of about 40 wildfires burning across western US, has destroyed homes and forced evacuations.

text: Extreme heat forced Philly to cancel its 250th parade. Tourists flocked to Independence Mall anyway - WHYY

text: Who are the ultratraditionalists rebelling against Pope Leo and triggering a rupture with the Vatican? - NBC News
fullText: In a rare move this week the Vatican’s doctrine office declared the Society of St. Pius X in schism and decreed the excommunication of its bishops and priests.

text: Flyers tender offer sheet to Ducks center Leo Carlsson, take the big swing for a star - PhillyVoice
fullText: Just as it seemed the Flyers were set to wait, GM Danny Brière took a huge gamble on landing a star center in Leo Carlsson.
